attribution.reasoning: Seed anchor domain. WHOIS registrant matches tenant organization name. SOA and NS records consistent with scope definition.
Subdomain of confirmed seed anchor acme-corp.com. DNS A record resolves to IP in same /24 CIDR as apex domain. Certificate SAN includes this subdomain.
Subdomain of confirmed seed. Certificate SAN match. HTTP response contains Acme Corp branding.
Subdomain of confirmed seed. Certificate SAN match. API responses include Acme Corp branding in error pages.
www CNAME to apex domain. Identical content and TLS certificate.
Resolves from 4 confirmed subdomains. AWS IP range match for CloudFront. WHOIS references Acme Corp ASN.
Resolves from staging.acme-corp.com. Same /24 CIDR as confirmed apex IP. PTR record matches org pattern (host42.acme-corp.com).
MX record for confirmed apex domain. Certificate SAN match. Google Workspace SPF include confirmed.
Subdomain of confirmed seed. Certificate SAN match. VPN service banner confirms organizational deployment.
Subdomain of confirmed seed but DNS resolves to third-party CI/CD provider IP. No certificate SAN match. Likely a CNAME to external service.
Subdomain of confirmed seed. CNAME to WordPress.com hosted blog. Content references Acme Corp but IP is shared hosting.
Subdomain of confirmed seed. CNAME to Atlassian Statuspage. Branded content but third-party hosting.
Resolves from mail.acme-corp.com only. IP belongs to a shared hosting provider. WHOIS registrant does not match Acme Corp. Possible shared mail infrastructure.
Resolves from vpn.acme-corp.com only. Same /24 CIDR as apex domain. Dedicated VPN appliance IP. WHOIS registrant inconclusive.
S3 bucket named acme-corp-public-assets discovered via CT log certificate entries. Name matches organization pattern but AWS account ownership not verified.
NS record for confirmed apex domain acme-corp.com. Different registrable domain (acmedns.net). Could be a managed DNS provider or an Acme-owned DNS infrastructure domain.
Secondary NS record for confirmed apex domain. Same analysis as ns1.acmedns.net.
Discovered via CT log alternate certificate with acme-corp.com SAN. WHOIS confirms Acme Corp ownership but the IP serves legacy infrastructure with TLS 1.0.

errors.message: AWS API rate limit exceeded for S3 ListBuckets; retried 3 times

tenant_quota_warnings.details: cloud-scanner hit AWS API rate limit; 2 of 5 enumeration calls throttled
